languages.text: "Кх-х-х-... От-сут-ствует ав-то-ри-за-ци-я. Дос-туп за-пре-щен". {n}Трахея исторгает из себя несколько желеобразных кровавых сгустков, после чего слова становятся четче.{/n} "Требуется санкция единицы Эоганн Фебрус".
"Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."
languages.original_text: "Кх-х-х-... От-сут-ствует ав-то-ри-за-ци-я. Дос-туп за-пре-щен". {n}Трахея исторгает из себя несколько желеобразных кровавых сгустков, после чего слова становятся четче.{/n} "Требуется санкция единицы Эоганн Фебрус".

traits.locale_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eo-gann Februs required."
"Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eo-gann Februs required."
"Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eo-gann Februs required."

languages.text: 「クッ…許可なし。アクセス拒否」{n}気管から幾筋かのゼリー状の血塊が吐き出され、その後に言葉がはっきりと聞こえる。{/n}「ユニット・エオガン・フェブルスの承認が必要だ」
languages.original_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."

traits.locale_text: 「クッ…許可なし。アクセス拒否。」{n}気管から幾筋かのゼリー状の血塊が吐き出され、その後に言葉がはっきりと聞こえる。「ユニット・エオガン・フェブルスの承認が必要だ」

languages.text: «Khhh... No au-to-rizado. Ac-ceso den-egado». {n}La tráquea expulsa unos grumos gelatinosos de sangre y el habla se vuelve más comprensible:{/n} «Se requiere la autorización de la unidad Eogunn Februs».
languages.original_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."

traits.locale_text: «Khhh... No au-to-rizado. Ac-ceso den-egado». {n}La tráquea expulsa unos grumos gelatinosos de sangre y el habla se vuelve más comprensible:{/n} «Se requiere la autorización de la unidad Eo-gann Februs».

languages.text: "Khhh ... Nicht au-to-ri-siert. Zu-griff ver-wei-gert. {n}Nachdem die Luftröhre einige geronnene Klumpen Blut ausgestoßen hat, werden die Worte deutlicher:{/n} "Autorisierung der Einheit Eogunn Februs erforderlich."
languages.original_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."

traits.locale_text: "Khhh ... Nicht au-to-ri-siert. Zu-griff ver-wei-gert. {n}Nachdem die Luftröhre einige geronnene Klumpen Blut ausgestoßen hat, werden die Worte deutlicher:{/n} "Autorisierung der Einheit Eo-gann Februs erforderlich."

languages.text: « Krrr... Non au-to-ri-sé. Accès in-ter-dit. » {n}La trachée expulse quelques caillots de sang gélatineux, et les mots se font plus compréhensibles :{/n} « Autorisation de l'unité Eogunn Februs requise. »
languages.original_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."

traits.locale_text: « Krrr... Non au-to-ri-sé. Accès in-ter-dit. » {n}La trachée expulse quelques caillots de sang gélatineux, et les mots se font plus compréhensibles :{/n} « Autorisation de l'unité Eo-gann Februs requise. »

languages.text: “咔……未-获-授-权。拒-绝-访-问。”{n}气管喷出几块胶状血凝块，随后吐字变得清晰起来：{/n}“需要单位‘伊奥贡·费布鲁斯’的授权。”
languages.original_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."

traits.locale_text: “咔……未-获-授-权。拒-绝-访-问。”{n}气管喷出几块胶状血凝块，随后吐字变得清晰起来：{/n}“需要单位‘埃欧-甘·费布鲁斯’的授权。”

languages.text: "Hıııı... Yet... Ki yok. E... Ri... Şim red... De... Dil... Di." {n}Soluk borusu, birkaç jelatinimsi kan pıhtısı atıyor. Sonrasında kelimeler netleşiyor.{/n} "Eogunn Februs biriminin yetkilendirmesi gerekli."
languages.original_text: "Khhh... Not au-tho-rised. Ac-cess den-ied." {n}The trachea expels a few gelatinous clots of blood, after which the words become clearer:{/n} "Authorisation of unit Eogunn Februs required."

traits.locale_text: "Hıııı... Yet... Ki yok. E... Ri... Şim red... De... Dil... Di." {n}Soluk borusu, birkaç jelatinimsi kan pıhtısı atıyor. Sonrasında kelimeler netleşiyor.{/n} "Eo-gann Februs biriminin yetkilendirmesi gerekli."
